channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!! GOYIM!!!!! DJT — 101 replies — 404.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!! GOYIM!!!!! DJT

Open thread • Replies: 101 • Updated: 2026-03-09 05:03 UTC

OP

GO BANKRUPT FOR ISRAEL!!!!

GOYIM!!!!!

DJT

Early replies (first 3)

61954017
>>61954004
BIDENS OIL

61954029
>>61954004
that kid should have practiced his aim a bit more

61954034
>>61954004
I voted for this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61955810
>>61955421

61955818
>>61955810
its really not a lot of words at all
that said, I hear 130 million Americans are functionally illiterate so I guess it might be for you

61955826
>>61954140
Planning, competence, professionalism, and intelligence is a deep state plot to keep the orange man down.
MAGA

61955827
>>61955809
nobody in the US believes that, but even if they did I doubt they'd care much.

if Iranians don't want their kids accidentally blown up by either side they need to fight their leaders themselves, flee the country, or get out of the way.

it's pretty simple. Even iranians hate the Ayatollahs. I'm sure they understand some sacrifices will be required to get rid of them.

61955838
>>61954017
Yep blame Biden.

61955839
>>61954140
the US has literally been training for this exact scenario for the last 20 years. So has Iran

61955842
>>61955827
I know that the war is extremely popular in the US.
I wish you jews a good war.

61955847
>>61955809
>Trump wants to pull out of Iran, but you jews
trump is a jew.

61955852
>>61955827
>if Iranians don't want their kids accidentally blown up by either side
You israelis blew them up. You said it yourselves that there was a target next to it so you blew up both the school and that target, then you started lying after that by saying Iran blew up their own school.

61955859
>>61955753
a lot of people got hit hard by the obongo period of politics and never recovered. USA was actually understandably the great satan even to many of americans, but the only state-borne opposition to this was through the influence of russia, china and its spheres. you'd be hard pressed to find anyone on /pol/ circa 2015 that wasn't posting "based north korea, based putin" or the like to some effect.

this video was very popular when it came out, shit makes me laff now
https://files.catbox.moe/s0ma88.mp4

unfortunately some people never quite moved on from that, even after many examples that show these countries are really just despotic shitholes that aren't worth emulating

>>61955784
more hysterical than a woman.

i thought iran was winning and they'd destroyed 4/8 of the US THAAD batteries and the US secretly had thousands of US casualties :^) but now they're facing genocide i guess
#AllEyesOnTehran

61955870
>>61955842
>I know that the war is extremely popular in the US.
Going after Iran or N. Korea is a no-brainer

Dems and Republicans both hate Iran.

Jews are not a significant fraction of our population. You may be shocked to learn americans hate you on their own accord, without needing jews to tell them to.

or do you think fundamentalist christians and fundamentalist muslims would just get along great if it wasn't for those pesky jews?

are you fucking stupid?

61955879
>>61954004
I agree, desu. Get the strait open and the issue is doneski.

61955908
>>61955730
>iran's first act of foreign diplomacy after the revolution
What was that revolution against again? The puppet government installed by America? Right, right. And democratic Israel has been car bombing civilians and scientists ever since. They're weaker and less developed than America so naturally they'll wage war asymmetrically. You're just whining that they won't roll over and die for Israel. If we hadn't fucked around with them and their neighbors for decades none of that would have happened.

61955913
>>61954929
This is what it comes down to. How much does the blackmailed pedophile hate you and your race. I would rather have it directed outward to someone else and dodge the draft. I can sort of live a normal life if they don't draft people to die for Israel. Let some volunteer tard do it and win the Darwin award.

61955921
>>61955870
>>61955859
That's great you redneck retards/kikes/whatever trash you are, if you're the best military on the planet, then you should have no problem solving this issue and saving the white race quick.

Now open the Strait of Hormuz you fucking rat. My petrol prices have gone up 10%. I don't care how many iranians you kill.
The stocks are crashing, Korea is hitting its circuit breakers. The America empire will crash. All these countries are gonna ditch the US. The navy is not helping ships cross the Strait.

61955926
>>61955921
again
we've spent the last 20 years training the navy for exactly this scenario.

though we could leave it closed
that would be good for US oil production, wouldn't it?

61955946
>>61954711
Only way for Iran to settle would be forcing peace with Israel somehow so they don't get uppity again
But Trump is on Mossad's fingers so no negotiation can take place without Israel's approval. This war is existential for both sides. For Israel, its the last obstacle before becoming a superpower. For Iran, its about the regime surviving and also Trump's retardness made this a holy war to boot

61955987
>>61954004
1 billion per day nationally or 5k per family makes you bankrupt you are retarded.

this is a small price to support america's greatest ally

61956003
>>61954918
I think people are just entirely stuck consuming fake news. They don't follow commodities markets, FX markets, so they have no frame of reference for the quantitative impact of these actions except 30 second tiktok reels based on fake news.

61956013
>>61955987
>Survey: 43% of Americans Don't Have Savings to Pay for a $1,000 Emergency
https://www.usnews.com/banking/articles/2026-financial-wellness-survey

61956014
>>61956003
Now you get it. Took you some time, eh?

61956029
>>61955730
Why do you think they had the revolution, schlomo?

61956054
>>61955908
the shah's were the puppets of the US? just blatantly false lmao. if anything, western powers supported the islamic revolution to start with since it was the shah's who nationalised british-persian oil. ayatollah khomenei was hosted by france for years and the guadeloupe conference or whatever the fuck it was, that was when western governments came together to tell the shah he's fucked and they weren't gonna do anything

the revolution was a big tent of liberal students, marxists and islamic radicals moving against the monarchy, with the two former being betrayed in their promises by the latter.

btw iran didn't always have a bottom of the barrel military. its why i specified POST iran-iraq war, since before that iran actually had a top-rate airforce with a mix of eastern and western purchases, and they were pulling off shit like the H-3 raid on israel's doorstep. they switched their military doctrine to "act like a nigger, then cry when punched" after they got hit with embargoes and trade sanctions for... kidnapping and killing american citizens. gee who would've thought!!! so now they've got an aging fleet of museum piece F-4's, sacrificing air superiority over their own country, while they've had to rely entirely on china and russia to deliver them overpriced components for missiles to scrape together a subpar air defense that has to cover an area the size of western europe

and if anything, israel is the exact reason and model as to WHY iran shouldn't have access to nukes. because then, just like israel, they'd be untouchable

>>61955921
i can tell that you're brown because only brown people have pictures of random hillbillies saved on their shit lmfao

61956073
>>61954029
I wonder what’s going on in the good timeline where he didn’t miss.

61956089
>>61955421
Most of those things are still there or even worse under the Dems.

61956108
>>61956089
>It would be just as bad under the dems
Has the migger reached the bargaining phase?

61956133
>>61956108
Buddy, I fucking hate miggers, but labelling conservative whites "domestic extremists" has been going on for the last 4 years. Same with "Technocratic state surveillance".

Libtards controlled and censored all of social media until Elon bought Twitter.

61956177
>>61954918
The other people you could vote for want to chop off kid's dicks. All they had to do was not be completely insane and we wouldn't have Trump.

61956204
>>61954140
>Once Zlonsky sends us drones everything will be allright.

61956209
>>61954017
Oh boi bidens crypto market, bidens oil and on this week when stonks are opening, bidens stock market! At least alls well in israel!

item.title: please tell me he's going to TACO — 29 replies — 116.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
please tell me he's going to TACO

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-03-09 05:03 UTC

OP

please tell me he's going to TACO

Early replies (first 3)

61954821
>>61954806
unfortunately he will not. gas $10 / gal by may 1

61954915
>>61954806
Trump can't TACO alone, he has to get the consent of the IRGC and Tel Aviv too. Much meaner TACO to assemble.

61954949
>>61954806
>muh taco reddit meme
I told you people his policy is “Mass Confusion”. He started doing it day one after sucking up to neocons din’t work in his first term. Pay attention to what he does, not what he says. When I saw him moving ships to the Persian gulf I invested in oil tanker stocks right away.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61954986
>>61954806
The only way this ends is with either orange nigger nuking all of Iran or US sending him and his family to be hanged by mullahs in Tehran

61954989
>>61954806
what does tacos have to do with the markets?

61955357
>>61954806
He went all in, past the no return point. Now, he has to end with Iran, or Israel will cease to exist. And our good gueri tzebek can't afford that.

61955363
oil top right now 118.82

this is apocalyptic

61955373
>>61955357
he has to, 118.82 on a fucking sunday was beyond the worst case scenario. he needs to make a deal overnight now. truce or some shit.

61955488
>>61955373
I don't think you understand.

Every American unit in the ME could ceasefire, every ship could turn back, and not a plane could go into Iran. It doesn't matter, since Israel says it won't stop and Iran says it won't stop.

Orange man killed ANYONE and EVERYONE that had any sort of authority to end the war on Iran's end. They'll have to eliminate every single unit either through air power or boots on the ground.

America bombed a people that had trained CHILDREN to run across minefields to clear them. Why do they think they were going to surrender?

61955519
>>61954806
Israel will just hit Iran again

61955551
>>61955519
And accomplish what exactly? destroying Iran's oil and refinery does nothing but drive prices up even higher.

61955553
>>61955488
>end the war on Iran's end
simple solution kill the Israelis too

61955565
>>61954989
trump always chickens out

61955571
Holy shit you dumb faggots if he was going to TACO it was 2 weeks ago. We are pas the two weeks, IT IS HAPPENING, chudda was wrong.

You cannot simply 'taco' your way out of a closed strait, ruined oil infrastructure and an iran that is about to finish their nuke and drop it right on Rome as a fuck you to europe.

61955577
>>61955551
It's not about oil, it's about greater israel. It's about judeochristian values of killing everyone.

61955723
>>61955577
Yeah your right about Isreal. bibi's political party Unironically has drooling retards how think crashing the global economy and fighting "gog and mog" to the point of ruin will bring the mosiach

61955742
>>61954806
He wants to TACO, he's probably legit terrified from how this whole thing turned out and is probably having the mother of all crashouts behind closed doors. Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.

But he can't at this point, any backing out will basically be handing over the entire ME and doom the petrogoybux. And yes I'm scared because I honestly don't see a way out that isn't extremely bloody and costly

61955747
He only chickens out when he is based he doubles down when he is cringe.

61955766
>>61954806
just sell your shit and buy oil nigga

61955788
>>61954989
Taco because Trump Always Cucks Out

61955790
>>61955742
>Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.
This isn't something you realize 3/4 of the way through your presidential terms. You either know immediately on day 1 when they put your balls in a vice or never.

61955792
He literally can't

61956137
Wars begin when you will, but they do not end when you please." —NICCOLÒ MACHIAVELLI

Both parties have to agree to end hostilities. But why would Iran ever agree to a ceasefire when their dear leaders were assassinated? If anything they will just dig in more.

61956164
>>61956137
it ever occured to your tiny mind that they're hatred for yanks is so great and so vile that they might just agree to peace and play Trump's game

and then go and relick their wounds and come back stronger in 5-10 years

which is exactly what will happen because TACO NIGGA

61956171
>>61956164
You are clearly brown.

61956195
>>61954806
Nope just like Hitler--at the end of his life--thought the German people should be destroyed for failing his test we will be destroyed for failing Trump's test.

61956202
>>61955742
>Honestly I think Trump just now realized hes been getting played the whole time.
He's from New York. There's no way he took this long to realize he's been played by the Jews.

61956203
Trump really met his match on this one, I don't think he can TACO even if he wanted to

61956207
>>61956195
thats pretty based desu ngl

item.title: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHH — 59 replies — 114.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHH

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-03-09 04:40 UTC

OP

FUCKING OIL IS $104!!!!!!!!!
+14%%%% AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHH

Early replies (first 3)

61953190
this man is on suicide watch >>61950166

61953192
>>61953183
my honest reaction
>how the fuck is it still below $200?

61953223
> bobo at his nephews 9th birthday over the weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61954400
>>61953270
He's disappointed with how his life turned out to be.

61954420
I was gonna buy when the war stated but assumed it was priced in.
I'll buy now so it crashes, and save the world.
When gas is cheap tomorrow, you'll know who to thank.

61954436
>>61954420
What will you buy now? The market's closed.

61954545
>>61953223
i wish i could be a cool uncle like this

instead i'm a fat retard who stands meekly in the corner, observing, but never partaking

61954623
400

61954790
>>61953183
>OIL IS $104!!!!!!!!!
you wish

61954801
>>61953183
BVLLISH

61954833
Oh yeah I thinking it over

61954845
Trump really had no choice but to start this war. What else was he supposed to do?

61954887
$112

61954927
$114

61954937
>>61954845
Every day that goes by the world gets to see more and more how nonthreatening and incompetent Iran always has been. They've been a fucking nothing burger ever since Israel has wanted us to go to war with them Their "big bad nuclear" program was bombed in a fucking day. Their leadership literally dies the second they promoted. Their "coup de grace" is bombing all of their allies more than the enemies who attacked them. The fate of their country now lies in the reliable hands of college protestors, they've not only lost but have branded themselves in shame for generations to come.
Oh they closed a strait? With fucking what? The only thing closing the strait is jew insurance policies.

61955002
>>61954937
Operation Madman will surely save them.

61955060
>>61953183
Don't worry, Trump went golfing today.

61955113
>>61954927
$115 what the fuck dude

it literally cannot go any higher than this, it's done. 115 is top.

61955191
>>61955113
$117

61955248
Are the liberals owned yet?

61955845
>>61955248
They are owned, by jews.

61955868
>>61953183
>>61953224
>>61955248
Literally no one uses oil anymore, chud. Get an EV like a normal person.

61955889
>>61953235
It just keeps getting worse

61955903
It’s up 25% now LOL

61955923
>>61955868
tell that to your rubber, plastic, pharmaceutical, lubricant and fertilizer companies.

61955932
>>61955923
>racist chud coping when he realized he made the wrong decisions
Just deal with it in the real life, bro.

61955969
>all of India's oil getting shut off

Dhalits gonna starve.

61955976
I have 870 shares of wti ive been bagholding since covid. The ath was $40 in 2008 when oil was 140 a barrel. I know its not going to get close to that again, but what is a bullish but realistic sell target?

61955978
So how high are we going? 150? 200? 250?

61956015
>>61955976
I have no idea it really just depends on how long the straits are closed. But since there's no land invasion and only flinging of missiles back and forth this could last months or years.

61956019
>>61955978
Over 9000, hopefully.

61956101
>>61953183
still going up

61956121
>>61953391
INVEST IN GOYBOXES

NOW!!!!

item.title: OIL TOP CONFIRMED — 37 replies — 109.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
OIL TOP CONFIRMED

Open thread • Replies: 37 • Updated: 2026-03-09 04:51 UTC

OP

WHALE OPENED GIGASHORT ON OIL. EVERYTHING WILL BE FINE AND OIL IS GOING DOWN.

we're good, oil ain't going any lower. buy shorts on monday for free money.

Early replies (first 3)

61953753
>>61953747
wait this was on the 7th. fuck.

61953772
>>61953747
>Entry
>91.431
RIP Bozo. Bobo deserves to lose money.

61953786
I dont short thoughbeit

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61953904
>>61953747
remember when oil went negative
there is no limit to how high it can go shortterm either

61953933
1,000% chance this is a Trump insider who thought his whole “oil has stabilized” messaging would actually calm markets.

61953934
>>61953812
Those maps don't show ships with transponders turned off, also not even sure if thirdie tankers have transponders. There is such a thing as a darkfleet.

61953939
>>61953747
It's the cia isn't it

61953944
>>61953813
Traders who aren't retarded trade with 1 to 2% of their account.

61953954
>>61953747
One of my OIL longs has been taken out by the auto deleveraging system.
They won't let you win.

61953987
>>61953944
If you're going to spend $3 million it means you have money

The more money you have the smarter you are.

Look at Trump. A literal BILLIONAIRE and President of the Free Worlds. Smartest guy around.

61953998
>>61953792
Iran just blew up 3 tankers used by russia to circumvent sanctions, Iran's command structure is so fragmented the ground commanders have no idea who is who

61954000
>>61953747
>EVERYTHING WILL BE FINE AND OIL IS GOING DOWN.

61954011
>>61953747
He voted for it.

61954033
>>61953792
>my mom
The most reliable of sources

61954037
>>61953747
Where do they find this information?

61954038
>>61953747
>800k margin position
>trading oil on a crypto exchange
literally a small fry in the world of commodity trading.

61954136
>>61953944
So it could just be a hedge and not an attempt at profit.

61954466
>>61953987
>destroys your entire argument by masturbating in public

61954473
>>61953747
ICEsisse cope!
EVChuds WON

61954504
>>61953934
>turning off a transponder makes your giant tanker ship invisible to drones

61954524
>>61953747
>120 usd/barrel
kek why are people panicking? that's not even close to the biggest jump in oil prices

61955056
Welcome to /pmg/ fuckers. It was a bank just shorting to suppress the spot price. It happens to bullion at 8am est daily and 5pm est Sundays

61955095
>>61954524
bro we're at 114 right now

61955194
>>61953747
What? $3 million position in oil isn't that the equivalent of me opening a $10 position in Nvidia?

61955211
>>61953747
KWABOTY

61955266
top reached

61955307
Looks like he was wrong.

Huh this dumbass thread was only 3 hours ago? Feels longer.

61955510
>>61955266
I just made 60,000 dollars on oil futures and I'm going to have 250k by the end of the week while you keep calling tops that never come.

61955569
>>61955056
/pmg/ here, you are fucking retarded. Do you really think a 2.8M short can have any impact on the largest commodity market in the world lol? Oil is the cornerstone of modern civilization, it's not something you can tank with a fucking 3M bet on binance lol. There is $30M worth of oil futes changing hands every second.

61955988
>>61953944
>Equivalent of 24 future contracts
>Whale
AHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA
You can trade that all in one trade in one contract on one exchange and it wouldn't even register.
Daily Volume in COMEX WTI is like 3 million contracts.
>>61953813
If he gambled 280 million instead of 2.8 he'd move a whopping 0.07% of daily volume. Only on one exchange and one contract, of course.

61955997
>>61953904
They will pay you to store it in a shed you own? I could fit 4 barrels in my tool shed.

61956086
I might throw a little bit into USO, nothing I would get salty about losing if things reversed.

61956162
>>61953747
This one will be wiped out. Always the overly eager bears. Not time yet.

item.title: Started buying USO calls in January when it became obvious we were gonna do something stupid with Iran. — 20 replies — 80.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Started buying USO calls in January when it became obvious we were gonna do something stupid with Iran.

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-09 04:56 UTC

OP

Started buying USO calls in January when it became obvious we were gonna do something stupid with Iran. Lost like $2k when the Feb calls expired but now I’m beginning to feel like I won the lotto. Could end up being a life-changing amount of money. Current plan is to hold either until end of this week or next Wednesday. After that I’m considering waiting until the oil markets stabilize and then buying a large amount of SCO.

Thank you retard Monke Drumpf

Early replies (first 3)

61949476
>>61949287
finally..one of us made it

61949578
>>61949287
Nice pamp brother, we're all gonna make it.

61949593
28k is life changing money to you? What part of the third world do you hail from?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949603
>>61949593
Fuck off. Most folks are just getting by. $28k can help someone substantially.

Congrats anon, I've been playing with USO as well this week but I got in later.

61949608
>>61949593
Do the math on what the calls will be worth if WTI hits ~$150-$200 over the next two weeks.

61949624
>>61949603
This is the first time that obsessively following world events is actually paying off for me. I am so tempted to just move whatever I walk away with into SCO once things stabilize, but surely it can’t be that easy

61949654
>>61949287
Trump announces bad news on Friday night so the market won't be rattled, and he announces good news on Sunday before the market opens. He wants oil prices down and he knew what the Iran response would be to the attack before he did it. You might get caught with your pants down tomorrow.

61949690
>>61949654
Possible, but I am willing to be that the oil crisis doesn’t get resolved this week. Much more likely that it deepens.

61949694
>>61949690
*willing to bet

61949717
>>61949690
The US blowing up Iran's oil supply won't help prices come down. Since it's just for their own domestic use, that cuts off their exports since they now need to rely on that source.

61949732
>>61949287
i did the same but with UCO beacuse its atually tracks oil more accurately and i lost because trump kept delayng the attacks like a bitch

61949739
>>61949654
>he announces good news on Sunday before the market opens
there are no good news

61952864
>>61949287
OP, newfag here, how do I open an account for it?

61953277
>>61949593
there's still room left upwards, and then he can multiply it even further with the shorts
could easily spiral into an actually significant amount of money

61953293
>>61949287
good job bro
i just hold oil stocks (which will do nothing) because im retarded

61955911
>>61953293
Same wish I knew more about trading oil before this happened I would be very rich.

61956065
>>61949287
I would just start laddering out. Take some profit off the table, maybe like 10k and let the rest ride. Don't think we'll actually get $200 oil but maybe $150 for a little bit. Could get interesting

61956074
>>61956065
Also I'm a Sable Offshore (SOC) baggie but if this leads to them getting approved I will go absolutely ape shit

61956130
>>61956065
OP here.

Yeah, I agree that this would be the smart move. I’m probably going to hold on until Wednesday before I start exiting the position though.I think there’s a couple more days of panic left before we start seeing price controls.

61956178
>>61949287
Sell now this is the top

item.title: HOW DO I PROFIT OF DEATH AND DESTRUCTION? — 10 replies — 40.0/hr

61955815

be american. they've continuously done this for more than 100 years now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956119
>>61955820
Bottom left is literally me.

61956147
>>61955899
I seriously believe we’ll all be held to account in the afterlife for this.

61956151
>>61955899
What’s the alternative, just let evil dictators massacre their people? The places where we didn’t intervene had the most deaths statistically speaking, like Maoist China.

61956172
>>61956151
Shalom Ari , how is the weather in Tel Aviv ?
> literally cause more incessant pain and suffering in every war since ww2 with nothing to show for it besides 48 trillion in debt .

61956186
>>61956151
You need to grow up someday and stop swallowing the propaganda. We have never intervened in the affairs of another country with altruistic intentions.

61956193
Palantir, Lockheed Martin, Raytheon, gold, the Tel Aviv stock market

item.title: how tf do you buy oil? Is there like an amazon site where you buy barrells of oil? WTF? — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
how tf do you buy oil? Is there like an amazon site where you buy barrells of oil? WTF?

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-09 05:10 UTC

OP

how tf do you buy oil? Is there like an amazon site where you buy barrells of oil? WTF?

Early replies (first 3)

61955665
you just go to the gas station

61955686
You can't buy oil. Strait's closed

61955807
alibaba for wholesale price

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61955855
Americans say gas but in fact they don't mean gas they mean gasoline but they are just too lazy to say the entire word "gasoline" so they say gas.

61955950
>>61955855
americans deserve to be genocided. praise to the ayatollah! may he succeed!

61955956
>>61955657
USO

item.title: If all currencies that arent backed by commodities, by virtue practically all of them. — 3 replies — 8.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
If all currencies that arent backed by commodities, by virtue practically all of them.

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-03-09 04:48 UTC

OP

If all currencies that arent backed by commodities, by virtue practically all of them. And it's practically unreasonable to go back into a backed currency. If the US dollar ever becomes replaced, how is this not an evolution towards the mass adoption towards bitcoin?

I'm just asking because the only reason why the US Dollar is practically backed by oil is because of the US Military. I don't see a world where the Saudis, Chinese, or the Russians have a monopoly on said oil because they do not have the logistics chain necessary to become a world power like the US. YEAH, YEAH, YEAH, digital tulips and internet funny money aside. The world economy has been running on monopoly funny bucks since 1971 when the US ended their gold standard. Given the case that WW2 and the last 100 years of prosperity has been backed essentially by American logistics, unless you have a proper open economy to ensure they can handle the same, I can't see a future currency thats backed by material goods like oil or gold, because the inane demand and price of these resources would fundamentally make them unacceptable to be fostered by any single country to be a dominant currency.

Unless BRICs fully utilizes a blockchain-based gold backed currency, nobody will trust China or Russia to overthrow the US Dollar. Much less the Europeans to be sufficiently competetive in this space.

I'm just curious if anyone that has much more knowledge than me can help explain this thought process and counter it accurately.

Early replies (first 3)

61954868
>>61954816
I agree.

61955007
>>61954816
Your English is fucking atrocious.

61956150
>>61954816

You shall redeem nothing.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: boomer parents think I'm a bum because of Ai — 5 replies — 7.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
boomer parents think I'm a bum because of Ai

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-09 04:28 UTC

OP

My boomer parents, along with my extended family, have been freaking out over the Ai shit and telling all of us that there's no point in going to college for anything except "Ai". I guess they think LLM ownership is an actual degree plan. They straight up are discouraging any white collar jobs because of it and its pissing me off. They believe all jobs besides plumbing are going to be obsolete. I cannot talk about my career or financial plans around them because they're too blackpilled.

What is a good rebuttal for this? They're not helping me through college because they think engineering is on its way out. I really don't know what they expect me to do other than kill myself. (I won't, out of spite.)

Early replies (first 3)

61956010
>>61956004
Robots will take all of the crappy jobs too.

61956031
>>61956004
Imagine caring what others think and not using this to your advantage to troll the shit out of them and tell them to learn a trade since AI will make their Social Security obsolete since liberal millennials will take it away like AOC.

61956033
My financial advice is coast on free rent as long as possible. If you're going in-state to a public university (no reason to do anything else with engineering) then the loans are really not gonna be that bad even if you have to borrow your whole way through.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61956034
>>61956004
just tell them you will go into sales, and if they give you shit, show them your paycheck. poor fucks

61956063
>>61956004
>They're not helping me through college because they think engineering is on its way out.
This happened to me, but they had a different excuse for why they wouldn’t help, but I finished and my dad claimed he paid for my college. This is just boomer mentality man, just troll the shit out of them any time you get.

item.title: The US has 10 days — 142 replies — 259.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 142 • Updated: 2026-03-09 04:38 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61953343
>>61940570
It's literally construction crane not some advanced tech

61953401

61953413
>>61938425
Anyone earning above $250k doesn't really care if gas prices go up. Only poorfags genuinely get affected by it.

A rich person can go from spending $80 to fill up to $160, and if they make more than a million, that's like paying .80¢ vs. $1.60. For a poorfags, that's a death sentence since you can't shoplift gas, and you WILL get fired for not showing up to work, not being able to afford to fill up is not an excuse.

I say that as a European, that unfortunately lives in a EU nation.
Starmer, Sanchez, Macron, Merz...it's all the same bunch, that constantly makes decisions against the best interests of their people.
...and then they act surprised, that the oppositional parties are rising, which is ADANGERTOOURDEMOCRACY. No, it's simply FAFO and you will FO, whenever the voters get to make a choice.

61951363
>>61951313

They don't care about the people or interests of the nation, they just want to be the ones in charge who get all the sweet bribes just like the current leader. It's two sides of the same coin situation and any politician with the will to actually go against the system is immediately called a russian agent and ostracized from politics.

61951396
>>61951363
Farage, LePen and Weidel would be a much-needed upgrade for Europe. (No idea who that would be in Spain, but I didn't know Sanchez either until he declared to give hundreds-of-thousands of refugees the Spanish citizenship, so they can freely relocate within the EU.)
And as long as the establishment doesn't get them banned for wrongthink, they will probably rule in due time.
Unlike the usual Socialist/"""Conservative""" revolving door-style change-of-government, they are distinctly different, which is why they attract so much use of governmental power against them. The parties-of-old genuinely fear them.
Obviously can't vouch 100% for them, but they look like the only way out of this mess for Europe.

61951439
Americans are so fucking stupid. They deserve everything coming to them

61951451

61951456
>>61950220
it's funny because mutts mocking europoors for being slave imigrants cucksuckers, yet they have pedo president who starts blasting wars left and right, just to cover up his "love" to children. Amerimutts, say hi to your pedo jewish overlords.

61951458
>>61951396
Kek what mess? The mess of Russia not being able to just invade countries it desires, and the mess of USA not being able to just dictate what europe does? It’s funny how you chuds are simply too stupid to see your own benefit, instantly falling to foreign propaganda. Both Russia and USA want to see the EU gone, but this doesn’t raise any questions in your retarded brain?

61951481

61951489

The Dow is at 50k and trump wants to bang is own daughter and definitely diddled kids on Epsteins island .

61951493
>>61951458
(Among other things) the mess of uncontrolled mass migration. The people of the European nations are decisively against it.
Their only option on the ballot to stop that are the aforementioned oppositional powers, because the parties-of-old stand united against their people.
Now, make no mistake, I live in a town that has been having a large number of non-European foreigners since the late 60s/early 70s.
Even the migrants from back then have had it with the newer migrants (especially since 2015, but also since Bulgaria and Romania became EU nations).
They do not learn the local language, they can not provide for themselves, they are disproportionally criminal and some of them even hate the local people.
The parties-of-old (and the EU under their unchecked control) will fight for these guys to the blood. What the flying fuck do they expect the voters to do in light of that? The parties-of-old are the extremist forces, not the ones trying to represent the will of the people.

61951509
>>61951493
I agree that migration needs to be regulated but it’s no excuse to fucking dismantle all of europe and leave it naked for other great powers.

61951513
>>61951509
It's not about "dismantling Europe", though.
It's about turning the EU into a Europe of sovereign nations, so that the people are back in control instead of a completely detached "elite" in Brussels, that is effectively entirely unaccountable.

item.title: How high will OIL go? — 33 replies — 15.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
How high will OIL go?

Open thread • Replies: 33 • Updated: 2026-03-09 03:06 UTC

OP

150?
200?

Early replies (first 3)

61950050
>>61949961
The Trump admin probably starts trying to implement price controls above $150.

61950059
>>61949961
10,000 Gold.

61950077
How will crypto perform without rate cuts in the next 3 years?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950083
>>61950059
Eoy yes

61950184
>>61949961
That's Tehran right? So all those oil tanks were holding the oil that Iran was using to pay for those non-working radars and anti-ship missiles. Winnie the Pooh won't be happy about that.

61950223
I knew I should have bought an oil container when it was like 2.50 a gallon a little while ago but I had no idea how that would even work

61950468
>>61949961
The only thing keeping oil high is insurance companies. When they start insuring again oil will be flowing through the Strait again and oil will hit its top next week.

61950713
>>61949961
Alright, let's look at where this might go...

1973 Oil Crisis:

In March 1974, OAPEC lifted the embargo, but the price of oil had risen by nearly 300%: from US$3 per barrel to nearly US$12 per barrel globally. Prices in the United States were significantly higher than the global average.

- $3 -> $12 = 400% increase

- In today's dollars: $22.91 -> $83.76, 365.6% increase (which coincidentally also shows how retarded the way the gov calculates inflation is)

1979 Oil Crisis:

In January 1979, the U.S. crude oil first purchase price was approximately $9.46 per barrel. "Starting with the Iranian revolution, the price of crude oil rose to $39.50 per barrel over the next 12 months (its all-time highest real price until March 3, 2008)."

- $9.46 -> $39.50 = 417.5% increase

- In today's dollars: $45.05 -> $157.06, 348.6% increase

Oil's lowest price per barrel over the past year was $56.52, occurring on Dec 19th, 2025. If we multiply that by 400% we get a potential $226.08/barrel.

The price per barrel three weeks ago before it was completely obvious that the US was committed to attacking Iran was $60.71/barrel. 400% × $60.71 = $242.84/barrel.

61950718
>>61950184
The chinese tech from 2004? Imagine using that
>>61949961
They sell like 85% of that oil to middlemen who then sell the oil to China so not a big deal

61950728
>>61950713
(cont.)
A study recently done by Kansas State University found:

"Longer term, the price increase could be 4.2 cents per gallon for every dollar per barrel"

$226 × $0.042 = $9.49/gallon
$243 × $0.042 = $10.20/gallon

If we take the lowest percentage (bent by the gov's inflation calculator) of 348.6% and multiply that by the lowest price per barrel in the past year of $56.52, we get $197.03/barrel translating to $8.28/gallon.

Problems with stocking up on gas right now:

The gasoline supply in the US will remain the winter formulation until the beginning of May. Winter gas has a higher Reid Vapor Pressure (RVP), meaning it evaporates more easily than summer gas. This is less conducive to long-term storage. While people often claim that the RVP is so the gas ignites easier in winter, in reality the different formulation is mostly due to cost and air pollution concerns - in the winter, you can get away with cheaper formulations because the cold temps lead to less air pollution. Being more stabile, summer gas is better for storage any time of the year. Fuel stabilizers don't really improve this particular aspect of winter gas.

Various taxes, regulatory measures and subsidized incentives may also be implemented. Towards the end of the Carter administration, domestic oil was reduced to about 1/5th the global price per barrel through various measures including a windfall profit tax on oil companies which basically erased their profit margins from the high global prices keeping oil prices in the US for US use lower than elsewhere in the world. In 1980 the US imported about 40% of the oil it used so this didn't lower the price of gas by 4/5ths, but it did blunt the price felt by consumers. These efforts resulted in the price of gas only doubling instead of quadrupling. If gas prices only doubled from their pre-war average of ~$2.90/gal we'd see ~$5.80/gal.

61950790
>>61950728
>If gas prices only doubled from their pre-war average of ~$2.90/gal we'd see ~$5.80/gal.
a literal nothingburger.

BUYING GAS IS THE CHEAPEST PART OF OWNING A CAR!

61950801
>>61950728
>$8.28/gallon.
I checked and its higher then that in Germany.

61950847
>>61950801
My math was for the US only. As the world's largest producer of oil and now an oil exporting country, we have it better than most other countries.

61950857
>>61949961
No one cares about oil prices anymore, chud.

61950868
>>61950790
Driving a little gasoline Toyota Corolla 100,000 miles @ 40mpg and $5.80/gal: $14,500

Driving a larger electric Toyota bZ4X 100,000 miles at 252 miles per charge and $15/charge: $5,952

Look at what happened to the motor vehicle market after the 1973 and 1979 oil crises. Definitely not a nothingburger for investors.

61950872
>>61950857
Didn't Tesla stop making cars?

61950875
>>61950872
>tesla is the only ev maker
>>61950868
>still not owning an ev

61951080
>>61950184
>non-working radars
Funny that you say that

61951096
>>61949961
What oil stock do I buy bros????

61951236
>>61951080
Here is a real image, unlike your lazy well poisoning attempt
https://edition.cnn.com/2026/03/05/middleeast/radar-bases-us-missile-defense-iran-war-intl-invs

61951283
>>61949961
What will happen on Monday bros..?

61951306
>>61951283
Oil go up

61951325
>>61949961
At this point, over 300. Short term I'm guessing around 150.

61951346
>>61949961
I still don't understand why Americans give a blood sacrifice to Israel every 10 years. Is it some sexual thing?

61951350
>>61949961

This is the biggest oil production cut in the history of mankind. I don’t think an initial spike to $300 before face melting deflation kicks in is out of the question

61951441
>>61951346
It is a sexual thing and it's on tape.

61952245
>>61950875
>still not owning an ev

In the 90s and 2000s my dad was 100% against cell phones, despite cell phones having been around in some form since the 70s. He grudgingly finally got one for business around 2010. Now he doesn't have a home landline. You'll huff and puff for another decade while the world moves on from internal combustion vehicles, but you'll eventually own one like everyone else. Every oil crisis has accelerated the replacement of less efficient vehicles with more efficient vehicles, and we've maxxed out the efficiency of gasoline engines. New battery technology is already doubling range and longevity while halving charge time over what was possible just a couple of years ago. People are running out of excuses to avoid EVs and reasons to keep ICEs. So, you can be the modern equivalent of a guy in the 1930s still riding a horse into town and rejecting those new fangled automobiles, but from an investor standpoint EVs and the technology surrounding them are where the growth is and will continue to be. Personally, I look forward to a world without jeet-owned gas stations and white trash greasemonkey youtube slop.

61952254
>>61951441

oh vey

61952315
>>61952245
Yeah you want overpriced golf carts with planned obsolescence instead. Such an improvement!

61952559
>>61950713
>>61950728
Based and rare high analysis anon, Im doing an investigation currently myself but it’s difficult without drawing from past source’s because the current MSM story is far removed from reality even from a cursory glance. Need to keep eyes on the situation as it unravels, but it seems you’re indicating that this is more than a short spike and could be a year long event?

61954746
>>61950868
Spend an extra $20,000 on a car to save $8548 on gasoline

yore a geneos dude

61955625
>>61949961
it was about -$40 a few years ago so I'm guessing it might reach $3.50 soon

item.title: It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war — 98 replies — 10.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war

Open thread • Replies: 98 • Updated: 2026-03-08 19:43 UTC

OP

And that's a nothingburger

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268
>how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources?
Bombing a mountain just creates a field

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61948084
>>61946430
>so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free?
I am white but I am a poorfag loser it's true. Not trying to astroturf anything, that's genuinely how I feel about it.

61948208
>>61943069
there are american ones too but their job isnt to shill, its to create conflict between us poors so that we dont eat the rich. all the tranny posting is by them.

61948661
>>61942181
Around 2011 Stefan Molyneux, libertarians and the tea party were saying the US Government was in $14 trillion of debt and there is no way the forever wars can continue. Look at us now.

https://odysee.com/@freedomain:b/another-imperial-quagmire-dr-ivan-eland:c

61948695
>>61943665
What an inane schizo rant. There is not a single indication for this to be true.

61948804
>>61942181
I voted for this

61948817
>>61943056
Germany declared war on the USA and not the other way around

61948937
>>61943665
>theories jewish psychologists invented, and retarded pseuds peddle to try and poison the well of Hitler-sentiment to keep the goys from waking up.
JlDF trannies are like broken records i swear, did they just replace you freaks with AI or something? hard to tell.

>>61948817
on paper they did, because the USA baited Japan, their ally, into attacking them, by blockading their cargo ships so they couldn't source crude oil. I could personally declare war against the USA right now from new zealand, but its as meaningless as when HitIer did.

>>61948661
alot of geopolitical and finance bros outside the normie sphere thought the same thing, but we were all blinded by one problem, every single US president and all the top officials were all controlled ped0s and puppets for globohomo. and on top of that, they were all retarded too.

But nobody realised HOW retarded and corrupt, because a relatively normal man with a good head for old-school economics, stepped in and simply copied what has worked in the past for the USA, and in his personal life. Its not a scenario that anyone could have predicted.

Trump is potentially solving the national debt by taxing the rest of the planet to do it. It'll probably work too, for awhile, until the rest of us go broke because of it. The central banking carteI designed this system to fail, not work for everyone.

61949034
used to browse 4chan all the time. old /pol/ etc yada who cares. fuck me this place looks dated. even if 99% of people here were working for some government agency or another - it's still just a rss feed for twitter which stopped mattering 8 years ago. who the fuck even bothers shilling on 4chan in 2028-2?

61949083
>>61943623
You are the midwit that believed your history teacher when he divided the class between non blond and blued eyed people vs everyone else and told that Hitler would kill everyone on the non blond/blue eyed side

61949561
>>61942633
Trump is a lot smarter than people give him credit for, and that is bad thing..
Don't get me wrong, i don't think there is any plan, most of it just seems to be throwing spaghetti at the wall and see what sticks.
..and "what sticks" - a desired outcome, seems to be either money (for him), elite loyalty, and/or creating prestige around his persona.
I think the war in Iran is about elite loyalty - money and prestige could certainly arise as an opportunity to be taken, but the main reason the US is at war with Iran is to cater to pro-Israel elite in the US.

61949755
if Steiner attacks, everything will be alright.

61950271
>>61942478
>>61942920
Israel wants regime change.
Trump wanted to accomplish that with the same tactics as Venezuela.
Venezuela was a not a regime change per se but was a capitulation that could result in peaceful regime change if the US enforces fair elections.
So they were trying to do something similar, "it's just that easy, kidnap/kill the leader!"
The problem is that the devil is in the details. Maduro was genuinely broadly unpopular, with uprising blocked by Cartels with a profit motive and Cuban Communist ideology. The Cartels fold if they smell profit and the Cuban control was naturally very weak and not sustainable.
Meanwhile the Iranian opposition is not broadly popular, neither is restoring the Shah, and Islamic ideology is not weak.
The protests were not an Arab Spring.
So creating a martyr of the Ayatollah obviously didn't work.
So the leaders are gone, but the regime is still intact, and there is no plan. Just like Iraq, boots on the ground are required for regime change, and Trump would instead prefer to end this quickly and open up the Strait of Hormuz.
Boots on the ground is insanely unpopular, and protracted conflict means oil-induced recession, and Iran would be foolish to agree to any ceasefire.

61950276
Iran will fall and within a year of that, America will fall too. This entire war is engineered to leave Israel as the top dog in the middle east that doesn't have to answer to anyone.

61950277
>>61942181
US govt is nothing more than an international criminal terrorist mafia
And the US military are carrying out acts of terrorism and genocide on behalf of ziocons

61950288
>>61950271
>Regime
Iran has a legitimate government.
The genocidal terrorist states of us and Israel are ruled by criminal mafia 'regimes'

61951750
>>61950277
thanks for the generic retard-commie take, thats a fractional half-truth told to deliberately mislead people. Retard.

>>61950288
religious dictatorships that originally formed from seizing power during a foreign coup, are not legitimate governments. Legitimate governments are ones the majority of the citizens of that country want in power, Iran's leadership are retarded, inbred, genocidal murderers at the best of times. And you're enabling that with your disgusting sycophancy.

There is 1 single positive about Iran, and thats they're not part of the IMF and don't bend the knee to the centraI banking carteI kikes. That's it, the rest is nothing but negatives. They're even more disliked than lsraeI by their neighbours.

61951769
>>61945267
Inverse jim cramer is defunct
Hes right
Seethe more

61951785
>>61942478
>The problems is that the US simply doesn't know what it wants.

The US knows exactly what it wants, to remind people that it holds the biggest stick in the room and to remind them that it controls most of the energy in the world which means it controls most of the world. They want the straight closed, they want countries to suffer, they want hyperinflation so people flock to the dollar and US assets. They want oil prices high enough to make developing venezuela viable. They want to shove a dagger in china's side and show them that they're not ready to invade taiwan yet.

61951788
>>61951785
the 55 IQ tell (and the hint to ignore everything that you dictated to your speak-and-spell software) is your mention of a chinese invasion of taiwan.

61951800
>>61945575
>proffessor chink-chonk ping-pong
Has this monkey been right about anything, even once?

61951807
>>61951788
>China has been salivating over seizing and taking back Taiwan for longer than anyone ITT has been alive
>their media hypes it up as a positive to chinese nationals all the time
>MY countries fake news government propaganda "news" outlets, abide by CCP dictats and refuse to call Taiwan, Taiwan, the Australian's government hack-media call Taiwan Taipei, every single time.
>UN officials wont speak to journalists who ask them about Taiwan at all.

You think China doesn't want to invade Taiwan? are you a chink shilling yourself, or just extremely retarded?

61951811
>>61951788
Whether they actually intend to invade or not doesn't matter, it shows them that the US knows their weakness and will go to any length to exploit it should they attack. The threat of cutting off chips is a serious one and real countries don't just sit back and say 'oh they'll never do it, they would be crazy'. The US just showed you that there are countries that will do crazy things if you get complacent.

61951816
>>61951807
>>61951811
i am replying to individuals who likely have a GED and who earn an $18-24/hour "living" by performing manual labor.

61951851
>>61951816
Engineering degree and $65 an hour at a cushy boomer job with a retirement plan.

61952536
>>61942513
The multimillenarian Sanhedrin is strong in race. Everything is happening as planned. Solomon God King will come, to show the people of the world, what true Strength really is. When the time of the prophecy comes, when all is revealed, the people of the world will rejoice, already knowing who the māšīaḥ is.
Indeed HE who has to come is now HE who has come.
You people rejoice. Death, is not the end.

61952552
How can people even debate this? The US and Israelis are bombing targets with absolute impunity. Iran has no navy, no air defense, no air force... When the targets start drying up, the war is over.

61952615
>>61948937
>Let the anglos leave at Dunkirk, when they were at his mercy.
>Attack Russia, when already fighting against the anglos: Operation Barbarossa. Sure if Napoleon couldn't go further than Moscow, germany, against both the anglos and russia, can do it.
>Two fronts, against two different powerful adversaries, actually the two most powerful: anglos and russia.
>ignore america's production capacity in tanks, planes, trucks boats, because, why not. Which obviously was enter the war for little brother Britain at one point.

61952623
>And that's a nothingburger

61952638
What was the last war the US won anyway? Korea: lost (NK exists and has nukes), Vietnam: lost, Afghanistan: lost, Middle East: speedrunning the loss right now.
